command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.118 "sudo tee /etc/network/interfaces > /dev/null << IFACE
source /etc/network/interfaces.d/*
auto lo
iface lo inet loopback
allow-hotplug ens33
auto ens33
iface ens33 inet static
  address 192.168.0.203
  netmask 255.255.255.0
  gateway 192.168.0.1
  dns-nameservers 8.8.8.8 8.8.4.4
IFACE
echo CONFIG_WRITTEN && cat /etc/network/interfaces" 2>&1
